verses.text: God leaves nations to test and teach Israel war. Tested. God proves their obedience.
God leaves nations to test and teach Israel war. Tested. God proves their obedience.
God leaves nations to test and teach Israel war. Tested. God proves their obedience.
God leaves nations to test and teach Israel war. Tested. God proves their obedience.
They intermarry and serve other gods. Mixing. Compromise breeds idolatry.
They intermarry and serve other gods. Mixing. Compromise breeds idolatry.
They intermarry and serve other gods. Mixing. Compromise breeds idolatry.
They serve Cushan; Othniel delivers them, and the land rests forty years. Othniel. The first judge saves.
They serve Cushan; Othniel delivers them, and the land rests forty years. Othniel. The first judge saves.
They serve Cushan; Othniel delivers them, and the land rests forty years. Othniel. The first judge saves.
They serve Cushan; Othniel delivers them, and the land rests forty years. Othniel. The first judge saves.
They sin again; Eglon of Moab oppresses them eighteen years. Eglon. Sin returns, oppression follows.
They sin again; Eglon of Moab oppresses them eighteen years. Eglon. Sin returns, oppression follows.
They sin again; Eglon of Moab oppresses them eighteen years. Eglon. Sin returns, oppression follows.
Ehud, left-handed, brings a present and a hidden dagger. Ehud. God raises an unlikely deliverer.
Ehud, left-handed, brings a present and a hidden dagger. Ehud. God raises an unlikely deliverer.

He stabs Eglon in his chamber and escapes. Slain. The oppressor falls.
He stabs Eglon in his chamber and escapes. Slain. The oppressor falls.

He stabs Eglon in his chamber and escapes. Slain. The oppressor falls.
Eglon's servants find him dead. Discovered. The deed is done.
Eglon's servants find him dead. Discovered. The deed is done.
Ehud rallies Israel; Moab is subdued; rest eighty years. Rest. Deliverance brings peace.

Shamgar slays six hundred Philistines with an ox goad. Shamgar. God saves by humble means.
